'''Shea''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] who was the [[bond-wife]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] and was known to have bore him at least one child. Although most [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Code/Legends|were not allowed to marry]], Ki was an exception because of the extremely low male birthrate on [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]. In fact, the birth rate was so low he was allowed to keep the [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] custom of [[polygamy]]. Shea was killed at the [[Battle of Cerea]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
